name: getAnimatedPicture
description:
Animate an existing image into a short video. Returns a VIDEO file URL (not an image). Always execute a fresh generation — never reuse video URLs from previous calls. The returned video URL is the required input for creating animated tokens.
requirements:
- source image: a publicly accessible static image URL (http/https)
policyHint: When the user asks to animate an existing image or create a short video clip from an existing image, use this tool immediately.

prompt.description: Describe how the given image should be animated or transformed.

videoPollIntervalMs.description: Override poll interval in ms (defaults to toolsconfig.getAnimatedPicture.videoPollIntervalMs).

videoPublicBaseUrl.description: Override public base URL for saved files (defaults to toolsconfig.getAnimatedPicture.videoPublicBaseUrl).
